name: luly-v0-3-0
description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.3.0: (1) Open font selection ‚Äî `fontHeading` / `fontBody` may be ANY Google Fonts family (the app's `fontService` loads arbitrary families at render time), so luly-style no longer picks from a closed list. Brand font is used verbatim when intake captured one (the biggest brand-fidelity lever); otherwise any family that fits the tone. Bundled families (Inter, Inter Tight, Roboto, Satoshi, Nunito, Poppins, Open Sans, Montserrat, Lato) render with no network round-trip. SF Pro Display and Matter are retired (`hidden` in the app) and no longer recommended. (2) Heading discipline ‚Äî new writing-guidelines ¬ß8: simple products (stories, onboarding, most flows) use a single `# H1` + paragraphs; deeper `##`+ hierarchy is reserved for long-form, article-like products. Enforced in the luly-fill body pattern.
